title: 有馬記念の後に・恩讐の果てに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unstoppable White Lightning wins the Arima
Kinen. Impressed by her prowess, Oguri Cap
wholeheartedly implores Tamamo Cross to
continue her racing career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the fierce battles her body's endured,
Tamamo Cross tells me she can keep running.
She's been reborn, and it seems my support is
what awakened this change in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no intention of ceding to the next
generation yet, she announces that she's ready to
jump back into the Twinkle Series starting next
year.
